title: Rocket Redux
description: Rocket riding and other auxiliary features
body:
**Rocket Redux has been merged into [Locked & Loaded](https://modrinth.com/mod/locked-loaded)** and is discontinued on 26.1+.

Rocket riding, ULTRAKILL-style.

![Riding a firework rocket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/otLYjY7F/images/39b28c1b8b3c9e07eab17e575ffeb646e248a79d.png)

## Rocketry

An enchantment for crossbows, incompatible with Multishot and Piercing.

### Effects

- Halves firework rocket speed and doubles flight duration
  - Firework rockets travel the same distance, only at half the speed
- Firework rockets without an explosion are given a random simple explosion
- Pillagers and Creative players will load a firework rocket by default instead of an arrow
- Shooting a firework rocket down (≤45° from straight down) while falling will make you mount the rocket
  - The rocket will aim in the direction you look
  - The rocket will still explode after the normal time or upon collision, so you must dismount in time and avoid obstacles to avoid taking damage
  - Since the rocket explodes when colliding with blocks, you must aim back up to avoid hitting the ground immediately
  - *Note: May be more difficult to execute with high ping/latency*

### Obtaining

- The enchanted book can be obtained from End City chests and Trial Chamber vaults
- Pillagers in waves 6+ of raids have a chance of spawning with a crossbow enchanted with Rocketry

## Notes

- Supports enchantment descriptions
- Planned: Enchancement support
